PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills\\gstack"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills\\gstack" | Select-Object Name } else { "gstack NOT INSTALLED at $env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills\\gstack" })

PowerShell($p = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills"; Write-Output "Checking: $p"; Write-Output "Exists: $\(Test-Path $p\)"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "Contents:"; Get-ChildItem $p -Force | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills\\gstack" -Force | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\)" }; Write-Output "---office-hours:---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills\\gstack\\office-hours"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills\\gstack\\office-hours" -Force | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\)" } } else { Write-Output "  NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md ==="; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\CLAUDE.md"\) { Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\CLAUDE.md" | Select-String -Pattern "gstack|office-hours" -SimpleMatch -Context 1,1 } else { Write-Output "NO global CLAUDE.md" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== ~/.claude/settings.json \(plugins/skills sections\) ==="; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\settings.json"\) { Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\settings.json" -Raw } else { Write-Output "NO settings.json" })
